_meta.name: CK International Launch Policy v1
_meta.principle: Everything is configuration, not constants. No `if (country===...)` in code — code reads these tables. Expanding to a new market = editing this file, not rewriting.
_meta.decided: 2026-06-27 (owner). Tax-registration flags default OFF until accountant confirms thresholds; machinery is built so enabling is config-only.
_meta.currency_model: base GBP cost -> live FX -> per-category margin -> regional retail. NEVER store fixed retail working backwards.
_meta.fallback_rule: preferred provider -> secondary provider -> manual review. NEVER auto-reject a paid order.

tax._note: VAT OFF until VAT-registered. Do NOT charge VAT before registering (illegal). Register only once turnover nears the UK ~£90k threshold, then set enabled:true.
OFF day one. Connect TaxJar/Avalara/Stripe Tax + enable once you cross a state economic-nexus threshold (commonly US$100k/yr in a state).

ioss._note: EU Phase 2. Once registered: collectVat=true, provider receives IOSS number on customs declaration. No code rewrite.

gpsr._note: EU Phase 2. When enabled, product pages render the Responsible Person block.

excludedCountries._note: Hard-disabled regardless of provider support (sanctions / fulfilment+payment complexity). Everything else depends on provider support.

marginsByCategory._note: Target gross margin per category. retail = cost / (1 - margin), then round. Per-category, NOT global.

pricing.displayPriceRule: owner decision: auto-compute base GBP from Gelato GB cost / (1 - category margin), THEN round to clean price points per category (charm .99, wall art to nearest £5). Owner may tweak individual prices after. Local currencies via FX; checkout re-quotes for the real region/cost.

shipping.liveQuote: provider quote API; cache briefly; show standard + express

returns.globalPolicy: 30-day: damaged / wrong item / manufacturing defect -> replace or refund
returns._note: configurable text only; statutory rights (e.g. EU 14-day) honoured via legal Terms

insideLabel._note: DTG-printed CK label inside the collar (logo + care info). Gelato removes the maker's tag; small legal care/origin tag stays. Adds a small per-garment print cost. NEEDS a print-ready label asset (logo + size/care text) per garment.

hangTags._note: Gelato+ subscription feature — revisit once earning.

packagingInserts._note: Gelato+ subscription feature — revisit once earning.

productAvailability.rule: per product: provider, providerProductId, supportedRegions, enabled. Unavailable in region -> hide, not error.
